productName: Honey Tree Live Resin Prana Pulse AIO Disposable - Blueberry AK47
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Blueberry AK47 oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of blueberry, chemical, and berry, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
